instruction: Fix take_page(items, offset, limit) to return a new list containing at most limit items beginning at the zero-based offset. Accept list or tuple input. Reject booleans and non-integer offset or limit values, reject negative offsets and non-positive limits, and raise ValueError for unsupported item collections. Do not mutate the input; an offset at or beyond its length returns an empty list.
acceptance_criteria: take_page returns the correct bounded window as a new list
take_page handles tuple, empty, and offset-past-end inputs
take_page raises ValueError for unsupported collections or non-integer indexes
take_page raises ValueError for negative offsets or non-positive limits

verifiers.name: bounded-window
verifiers.criterion: take_page returns the correct bounded window as a new list

verifiers.name: edge-inputs
verifiers.criterion: take_page handles tuple, empty, and offset-past-end inputs

verifiers.name: invalid-types
verifiers.criterion: take_page raises ValueError for unsupported collections or non-integer indexes

verifiers.name: invalid-bounds
verifiers.criterion: take_page raises ValueError for negative offsets or non-positive limits
